title: Buttery Crumbly Egyptian Butter Beans Crumble
description: This romantic egyptian dish features madras paste and is perfect for a light breakfast or snack. It's vegan-friendly and pescatarian-safe.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp sumac powder
ingredients.notes: for a touch of tanginess and brightness

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp madras curry paste
ingredients.notes: can also use mild or regular curry for those who prefer milder flavors

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the finely chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté for about 5 minutes until softened and translucent.
Stir in lemon juice, sumac powder, and madras curry paste. Mix well.
To this mixture, add drained cannellini beans and season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Simmer the mixture for another minute or two, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Using a pastry cutter or your hands, mix in 1/2 cup of breadcrumbs until you get a crumbly texture.
